hero.title: Sell 3× faster on OLX and Vinted
hero.subtitle: Upload your photos, AI does the magic — optimized title, description and tags in 10 seconds. Your listings will stand out.

howItWorks.title: Simple as 1, 2, 3
howItWorks.subtitle: Generate a professional listing in less than a minute
howItWorks.step1_desc: Drag & drop up to 10 photos. AI analyzes quality of each photo and tells you how to improve them.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Claude AI identifies the product, evaluates photos with 1-10 score and generates platform-optimized content.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Title, description and tags ready to copy directly to OLX or Vinted. One single click.

beforeAfter.title: The difference is clear
beforeAfter.subtitle: Same product, completely different listing
beforeAfter.before_desc: good condition, price negotiable, call me
beforeAfter.after_title: iPhone 13 Pro 128GB Graphite | Excellent Condition | Battery 89%
beforeAfter.after_desc: iPhone 13 Pro in impeccable condition, carefully used. Screen without scratches, original case. Includes: original box, Lightning cable, Apple silicone case. Battery at 89% (verified in settings). Ideal for professional photography with 12MP ProRAW triple camera.

socialProof.title: Join those who sell faster
socialProof.t1_text: I sold my phone in 2 hours after using AnuntAI. Before it sat for a week!
socialProof.t2_text: The generated descriptions are much better than what I used to write. Worth every penny.
socialProof.t3_text: I use it for all products on Vinted. Saves time and I sell faster.
socialProof.t4_text: Sold 3 products in my first week. The generated titles are incomparably better than what I wrote.
socialProof.t5_text: No more hours writing descriptions. 10 seconds and the listing is ready, complete, professional.
socialProof.t6_text: From 30 views to 120 on the first day after AnuntAI. Completely changes the game on OLX.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs

guarantee.title: Buy with zero risk
guarantee.subtitle: Not happy in the first 14 days? We refund in full, no questions asked.
guarantee.secure_desc: Processed via Stripe, the global standard.
guarantee.cta_sub: No credit card required for free plan

recommendations.title: Sell more with these tactics
recommendations.subtitle: Tested strategies from top sellers on OLX and Vinted
recommendations.tip1_desc: White background and natural light increase click rate by 47%. Photos speak louder than words.
recommendations.tip2_desc: Put the brand and exact model first. Buyers search specifically — they find exactly what you list.
recommendations.tip3_desc: 499 RON sells better than 500 RON. Round numbers seem more negotiable, psychologically.
recommendations.tip4_desc: Post Tuesday-Thursday between 6-9PM — that's when buyers are most active on platforms.
recommendations.tip5_desc: Buyers return to trusted sellers. Mention any defects — you're building your reputation.
recommendations.tip6_desc: 8-12 mixed tags — brand + category + condition + model. Cover all search variations.

tool.title: Generate Your Listing
tool.subtitle: Upload photos and let AI do the rest
tool.upload_desc: Drag and drop photos here or click to select (max 10 photos, 10MB/photo)
tool.description_placeholder: E.g.: iPhone 13 Pro, 128GB, very good condition, battery 89%, original box...
tool.limit_reached: You've reached your daily limit. Upgrade to Pro for more listings.
tool.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
